productName: 0.5g Live Resin Inf. 2 Pack Joints - Candy Gas - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Candi Gas, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a pungent fuel flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
